scope: Cosmetic UI surface is live-verified clean (EMB-1..EMB-6 resolved). AI-review edge-function transport blocker for /hq/ai-suggestions Interpret with AI is now CLEARED at the transport layer (all seven AI-review functions deployed; OPTIONS 204; unauthenticated POST returns structured 401, proving the deployed function is reachable; platform_admin guard intact). Status not yet CLIENT_UAT_READY — awaiting live platform_admin retest of Interpret with AI + Source counterparties producing structured UI output, ai_trade_request_interpretations row, and ai_review.* audit rows with no downstream mutation. Three operator-verification blockers also remain: compliance_analyst live click-through, requester/trader live click-through, and platform_admin destructive flow against seeded UAT fixtures only.

ai_review_transport_resolution.incident: Daniel selected DEMO Commodity (MT-012 Archive Override) on /hq/ai-suggestions and clicked Interpret with AI; UI returned 'Interpret failed: Failed to send a request to the Edge Function'.
ai_review_transport_resolution.root_cause: The seven AI-review edge functions existed in code but had not been deployed to the production project. Production gateway returned 404 NOT_FOUND, which supabase-js surfaces as 'Failed to send a request to the Edge Function'. Function name, UI invoke name, CORS/auth pattern, and environment wiring were NOT the issue.

post_deploy_evidence.unauthenticated_post: 401 Missing authentication — structured JSON from the deployed function, proving it is reached

required_live_retest: Sign in as a real platform_admin account
Click Interpret with AI; confirm structured interpretation renders in UI
Confirm audit row ai_review.trade_request_interpreted is written
Click Source counterparties; confirm proposed matches appear in queue
Confirm ai_review.counterparty_sourced and ai_review.proposed_match_created audit rows are written
Confirm NO outreach, send, POI, WaD, formal-match, or verification mutation occurs
ai_review_transport_resolution.promotion_rule: Only after the live retest above passes may status be promoted to CLIENT_UAT_READY.

The three remaining blockers are operator-verification only: (1) compliance_analyst live click-through, (2) requester/trader live click-through, (3) platform_admin destructive end-to-end flow against seeded UAT fixtures only — destructive checks must NOT be run against live client or production-like data.
